prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic portrait of Sam Altman on a gritty rooftop at dusk, wearing a black bomber jacket with an OpenAI logo. He is flanked by exactly 4 cats in superhero costumes: a tabby Spider-Man, a black Batman, an orange Iron Man with a glowing reactor, and a tabby Captain America with a shield. The background shows a 1996 New York City skyline featuring the Twin Towers. A whiteboard reads "MISSION: MAKE INTELLIGENCE BENEFIT ALL." and lists exactly 4 checked items: "BETTER MODELS", "SAFE DEPLOYMENT", "REAL-WORLD IMPACT", and "SAVE SOME TREATS". A foreground wooden desk holds a retro 1990s laptop with the company logo, a mug reading "BUILD THE FUTURE TOGETHER", a walkie-talkie, and a WIRED magazine titled "THE AGE OF INTELLIGENCE IS HERE". Painted wall signs read "NEW YORK NO SLEEP. BIG DREAMS." and "THE FUTURE WILL BE BUILT 1996".
